_comment: Competitor list for the Phase 1A Greenhouse scraper. Each entry has a slug (the Greenhouse board path: boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/<slug>/jobs), a display name, and a tier. Tier governs how aggressively the scraper filters titles: 'primary' uses a broad filter (Director + Head + Senior Director + VP + SVP); 'secondary' uses a narrower filter (Head + Senior Director + VP + SVP) — plain Director skipped because consumer tech companies use it for senior IC roles. Move a company between tiers by editing its 'tier' value here. No code change needed.
